branch_manifest.description: WHILE loop not entered: bronze.Product is empty so @MaxBatch = CEILING(0/100.0) = 0, @BatchId=1 > 0, body never executes, target stays empty
WHILE loop body executed: products exist (< 100), @MaxBatch = 1, batch 1 inserted via OFFSET 0 ROWS FETCH NEXT 100
WHILE loop exit: after batch 1 completes @BatchId increments to 2, condition 2 <= 1 is false, loop terminates
WHILE loop iterates multiple times: > 100 rows in bronze.Product causes @MaxBatch >= 2; second and later batches use OFFSET 100, 200... ROWS FETCH NEXT 100
